title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Specialist and Senior Resident Posts
short_info: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Hospital Kota (ESIC Hospital Kota) Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in concerned Specialty from recognized university, registered in MCI or State Medical Council
qualification.details: Specialist Posts: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in the requisite Specialty from a recognized university, registered with the MCI or State Medical Council, with 3 years of experience for PG/DNB or 5 years for Diploma. Senior Resident Posts: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned Specialty from a recognized university, registered with the MCI or State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Specialist (Full Time): ₹1,21,408/- (Fixed) per month Specialist (Part Time): ₹60,000 + ₹15,000 per month Senior Resident: As per 7th CPC Level 11

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Kota?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Kota Specialist and Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates must report on this date for registration and the interview process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Specialist and Senior Resident posts at ESIC Kota?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Kota has announced a total of 15 vacancies for the positions of Specialist and Senior Resident across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident posts, candidates must possess a DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university and be registered with the MCI or State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Specialist and Senior Resident posts at ESIC Kota is 69 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ESIC Kota recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: For Specialist posts, the salary is ₹1,21,408/- (Fixed) per month for Full Time engagement, and ₹60,000 + ₹15,000 for Part Time engagement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ESIC Kota recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Hospital Kota located?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Kota is located in Kota, Rajasthan, with the pincode 324005.
